Meet the Coaches · 認識導師

💡 Mouse over / tap 導師可睇到 bio

Guddy
Vocal Director & Founder · SVA Lead Coach
Guddy
Vocal Director & Founder · SVA Lead Coach

超過30名樂壇歌手和藝人的歌唱指導，融合古今中外及正統聲樂教派，創辦「Systemic Vocal Advancement」逾10年，對唱好廣東歌有難以動搖的執著，開辦 School of Vocal Artistry 訓練樂壇明日之星。
Tim Sung
Singer-Songwriter · Music Therapist
Tim Sung
Singer-Songwriter · Music Therapist

Tim Sung，唱作人、聲樂導師、音樂製作人，人聲樂團《Backup Singers》男高音兼音樂總監。現修讀英國 Guildhall School of Music and Drama 音樂治療碩士，曾任醫院實習音樂治療師。推出個人單曲《半首情歌》及專輯《半歌手》，音樂以療癒為主題，啟發自我探索。
Kenny
Vocalist · Performer · Vocal Coach
Kenny
Vocalist · Performer · Vocal Coach

2018年獲取 Rockschool Vocal Grade 8。2020年與林家謙合唱《四人之境》並拍攝MV。2024年加入 Gospel Choir Promist，於港澳日本演出。曾任歌唱比賽評判、婚禮歌手、餐廳駐唱及商場表演嘉賓。
Chiling
Vocalist · Performer · Vocal Coach
Chiling
Vocalist · Performer · Vocal Coach

活躍於香港及台灣，自2016年在各大歌唱比賽屢獲佳績。2022年開始在IG經營和音系列，至今超過2萬粉絲。2025年舉辦個人音樂會《Dear Our Love》。現全職為SVA歌唱老師及固定駐場歌手。
Yan
Professional Vocalist · 800+ Performances
Yan
Professional Vocalist · 800+ Performances

超過800場婚禮及商演經驗，Rock School Vocal Grade 8。香港中文大學跨文化研究碩士。陳奕迅試聽會營火爭奪戰優勝組，回歸盃亞軍，「我敢唱」季軍及十優歌手，GC Kids 全能造sing冠軍。
Luigei
Cantopop Coach · Performer
Luigei
Cantopop Coach · Performer

SVA 廣東歌培訓導師，專注廣東歌表演技巧及舞台訓練。
Una
Sound Healer · ERYT-200 · Vocalist
Una
Sound Healer · ERYT-200 · Vocalist

前電台主持及Acappella樂團成員，專業駐唱及舞台表演歌手，ERYT-200資深瑜珈導師。鑽研吟唱共鳴、脈輪療癒，於德國、希臘、蘇格蘭以Kirtan音樂會交流。推出首支廣東話梵文Mantra作品《ōṁ asatomā sadgamaya (feat. SVA Choir)》。
J.Arie
Singer-Songwriter · Composer
J.Arie
Singer-Songwriter · Composer

著名唱作人，作品在歌壇廣受肯定。筆下誕生《至少做一件離譜的事》（Kiri T.）等膾炙人口作品，擁有豐富演出及寫歌經驗。
張紋嘉 Crystal
歌手 · 演員 · 藝人
張紋嘉 Crystal
歌手 · 演員 · 藝人

從歌手出發，近年專注演員工作，活躍於電視劇、電影及舞台劇。演戲與唱歌相輔相成，Crystal 將分享從演戲所得的靈感如何融入唱歌表達，教你由心出發設計有故事感的專屬舞台。
張進翹 Manson
Singer-Songwriter · Actor · 全民造星III ⭐
張進翹 Manson
Singer-Songwriter · Actor · 全民造星III ⭐

唱作歌手及演員。2020年參加 ViuTV《全民造星III》出道，為電影及劇集創作主題曲，日常以結他創作音樂。
Course Details · 課程詳情
Mon 週一
$3,000$2,700Early Bird
8 sessions · online
Sound Healing with Humming
吟唱療癒
All Levels
⏰ Every Monday · 7:30 PM · Online
👤 Una
「完全屬於自己的1小時」
Your own hour — entirely yours. No singing experience needed. Join online from your own private space, practice stillness, and begin to hear your true voice. Feel the healing integration of sound frequency vibration in body and mind.
Confirmed dates

Vocal Building
練聲小組
Open Level
⏰ Every Tuesday · 7:30 PM
👥 Kenny · Chiling + Guddy LEAD
(3 Guddy sessions TBC)
「每星期做一次 Vocal Gym!」
Your weekly vocal workout. For students with basic vocal awareness — max 5 per class. Build technique and voice control systematically, week by week.

Wed 週三
$5,400$4,860Early Bird
4G + 4P + 2 Free Jam
Live Stage Singer
歌手實戰小組
Intermediate
⏰ Every Wednesday · 7:30 PM
👥 Kenny · Chiling · Manson
「唱Live 唔係唱K囉！」
Live performance is not karaoke. For intermediate singers with basic performance experience, ready to break through onstage. Train spontaneity, sharpen live delivery, and accumulate real-world experience through Free Jam Sessions.

Thu 週四
$3,500$3,150Early Bird
8 + 2 rehearsals + 1 show
Cantopop Battle
廣東歌表演培訓計劃
Beginner / Student
⏰ Every Thursday · 7:30 PM
👥 Yan · Luigei · Crystal
「你會點樣揀歌唱？」
With so many Cantopop songs out there — how do you pick one that makes people remember you? The first group dedicated to studying Cantopop performance. 90% of past participants performed alongside Cantopop DJs at the Summer Music Festival.
Training

Fri 週五
$3,500$3,150Early Bird
4 online + 4 live
Music Therapy
聲樂與自我探索
All Levels
⏰ Every Friday · 7:30 PM
👤 Tim
Led by Tim, currently completing his MA in Music Therapy at a UK conservatoire. Drawing on music therapy concepts extended into vocal practice, this course guides students to explore the self, spark creativity, and examine their personal relationship with their own voice — understanding vocal technique and singing through a holistic mind-body-spirit lens.
